                  - heading "Spain seizes record amount of cocaine in Atlantic Ocean, authorities say" [level=2] [ref=e624]
                  - paragraph [ref=e625]: The Civil Guard found between 30,000 and 45,000kg of the drug on a freighter headed to Libya.
